name: systolab-platform
description: SYSTOLAB Revenue Intelligence Platform - deterministic MERN website diagnostics with no external paid APIs.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev -w packages/shared" "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
